emergent_themes.description: Participants who identify as mature students with different financial circumstances and expectations than traditional undergraduates
Strategic meal preparation systems that enable busy schedules but create vulnerability when systems fail
Use of professional/therapeutic language to rationalize and explain food choices and behaviors
Real-time tracking providing psychological comfort and control beyond just practical information

coding_summary: P010 represents a unique mature student segment with sophisticated food systems and professional language use. Her meal prep mastery enables a demanding work-study schedule, while weekend delivery serves as earned rewards. She demonstrates strong loyalty to Deliveroo's tracking features, viewing them through a therapeutic lens as 'containing.' Her mature student status creates tension between student pricing expectations and adult income/standards. The diary data reveals flexibility in her systems and authentic moments when meal prep fails, leading to campus food purchases.

coverage_gaps.reason: P010 is currently a mature student with established adult lifestyle and income, making post-graduation projections less relevant to her current situation
